Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class PipelineRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.PipelineRunner
public class PipelineRunner extends Object
Stateless pipeline simulation runner for MCP integration.

Supports multiphase pipeline flow calculations using Beggs and Brill correlation, including pressure drop, liquid holdup, flow regime, and temperature profile along a pipeline.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Runs a pipeline simulation from a JSON input string.
      Parameters:
      json - the JSON pipeline specification
      Returns:
      a JSON string with status and pipeline results

    • createFluidFromInput

      private static SystemInterface createFluidFromInput(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Creates a fluid system from the JSON input.
      Parameters:
      input - the JSON object containing components, model, temperature, pressure
      Returns:
      the configured fluid system

    • applyPipeConfiguration

      private static void applyPipeConfiguration(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe, com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Applies pipe geometry and solver settings from either top-level JSON fields or a nested pipe object.
      Parameters:
      pipe - the pipeline object to configure
      input - the runner input JSON containing optional pipe settings

    • getPipeInput

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject getPipeInput(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Returns the nested pipe object when present, otherwise the original input object.
      Parameters:
      input - the runner input JSON
      Returns:
      nested pipe settings or the input object when no nested object exists

    • getOptionalDouble

      private static Double getOptionalDouble(com.google.gson.JsonObject primary, com.google.gson.JsonObject secondary, String... names)
      Reads the first matching double value from a primary or secondary JSON object.
      Parameters:
      primary - the JSON object checked first
      secondary - the JSON object checked when the primary has no matching field
      names - accepted field names in priority order
      Returns:
      the parsed double value, or null when no field is present

    • getOptionalInt

      private static Integer getOptionalInt(com.google.gson.JsonObject primary, com.google.gson.JsonObject secondary, String... names)
      Reads the first matching integer value from a primary or secondary JSON object.
      Parameters:
      primary - the JSON object checked first
      secondary - the JSON object checked when the primary has no matching field
      names - accepted field names in priority order
      Returns:
      the parsed integer value, or null when no field is present

    • getOptionalElement

      private static com.google.gson.JsonElement getOptionalElement(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String... names)
      Finds the first non-null JSON field matching one of the supplied names.
      Parameters:
      object - the JSON object to inspect
      names - accepted field names in priority order
      Returns:
      the matching JSON element, or null when no field is present

    • createFluid

      private static SystemInterface createFluid(String model, double tempK, double pBara)
      Creates a fluid system for the given EOS model.
      Parameters:
      model - EOS model name
      tempK - temperature in Kelvin
      pBara - pressure in bara
      Returns:
      the fluid system

      private static double parseTemperature(com.google.gson.JsonElement element)
      Parses temperature from JSON element.
      Parameters:
      element - the JSON element
      Returns:
      temperature in Kelvin

      private static double parsePressure(com.google.gson.JsonElement element)
      Parses pressure from JSON element.
      Parameters:
      element - the JSON element
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getString

      private static String getString(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, String name, String defaultValue)
      Gets a string field from a JSON object with a fallback value.
      Parameters:
      input - source JSON object
      name - field name
      defaultValue - fallback value when the field is missing
      Returns:
      string field value or fallback value

    • errorJson

      private static String errorJson(String code, String message, String remediation)
      Creates a standard error JSON string.
      Parameters:
      code - the error code
      message - the error message
      remediation - the fix suggestion
      Returns:
      the error JSON string
